6 years after switching to Amazon music, I couldn't be happier. There were features I loved in Spotify, they had a slightly deeper library in a couple obscure genres, and I miss the playlists I spent countless hours curating, but after you get used to the Amazon Music interface, it's a better value at $69.99/yr annual subscription. Spotify is charging you WAY more than their service is worth. If they ever offer annual subscription discounts, I'll switch back, but not likely.
